content: We can reframe function calling for autonomous tool-use agents as an intrinsic curiosity-driven search process, where an ICM curiosity mechanism rewards agents for exploring under-validated tool invocation paths rather than only following the model’s top suggested tool call. This creates a self-improving loop where the agent builds a more robust validation dataset for edge-case tool usage as it explores.
source_topics: tool use function calling autonomous agent
trigger_topic: tool use function calling autonomous agent
